headline: Krafton settles with Subnautica 2 developer after drawn-out dispute over $250 million
summary: Krafton settled a $250 million dispute with its subsidiary, Unknown Worlds Entertainment. The settlement includes bonus payments to the Subnautica 2 developer's staff. This resolves a lengthy legal battle following the ousting of the studio's co-founders.

headline: Xbox testing disc-to-digital feature that digitizes a physical game collection
summary: Microsoft is reportedly testing a disc-to-digital feature for Xbox owners. This allows users to digitize their physical game collections. The move comes as Xbox may cease physical disc production, similar to Sony.

headline: Kobo Libra Colour e-reader is $30 off, returning to its old price.
summary: The Kobo Libra Colour e-reader is now $30 off, priced at $229.99. This deal effectively reverses a recent price increase. It's available at Kobo, Best Buy, and Target.

headline: Comcast’s split could make or break Peacock
summary: Comcast plans to split NBCUniversal, Peacock, and Sky from its broadband and wireless businesses. Peacock will now operate independently, without the backing of a combined company. This move will determine Peacock's future in the competitive streaming market.

headline: Walmart Has the Lowest Price on a GeForce RTX 5070 Prebuilt Gaming PC in 2026
summary: Walmart is offering the lowest price on a GeForce RTX 5070 prebuilt gaming PC for 2026. The CyberPowerPC Gamer Xtreme features the new 2026 Intel Arrow Lake Refresh CPU. This deal provides a cutting-edge gaming rig at an attractive price point.

headline: Next Metroid Game for Switch 2 Reportedly Leaked via Brazilian Age Rating
summary: The next Metroid game for Switch 2 has reportedly been leaked. A Brazilian government age rating filing revealed the unannounced title. This suggests a new Metroid installment is in development for Nintendo's upcoming console.

headline: We Build the LEGO Venom Bust, A Small-Scale Tribute to Marvel's Fearsome Antihero
summary: A new LEGO set features a bust of Marvel's symbiote antihero, Venom. This small-scale tribute is designed as an eye-catching display piece. It's an ideal addition for fans of the iconic character.

headline: Beat the Heat With Style: Save 44% Off the New DreamE Bladeless Tower Fan
summary: Save 44% on the new DreamE Bladeless Tower Fan. This deal offers a better price than Amazon Prime Day. It's a great opportunity to get a stylish fan and beat the heat.

headline: Watch full highlights as England come from behind to beat DR Congo
summary: England defeated DR Congo in a tense World Cup encounter. Harry Kane scored twice to lead England's comeback victory. They are now set to face Mexico in the last-16.

headline: Badenoch accuses Starmer of leaving defence spending 'mess' for Burnham
summary: Conservative leader Kemi Badenoch criticized Labour over defense spending. She alleged a missing £5bn in the defense investment plan. Badenoch accused Starmer of creating a 'mess' for Burnham to inherit.

headline: Is Burnham facing a £5bn defence 'black hole'?
summary: BBC Verify is investigating a potential £5bn shortfall in the government's defense investment plan. Questions are being raised about a significant 'black hole' in the budget. The investigation aims to clarify the true state of defense funding.

headline: England's warmest June on record following historic heatwave
summary: England recorded its warmest June since records began in 1865. The entire UK experienced its second warmest June on record. Met Office data confirms the historic heatwave across the region.
